steps.title: Identify the required and current temperatures
steps.content: The problem states the butterfly needs a body temperature of at least 55.0°F to fly, and currently its temperature is 34.3°F. To find the minimum increase needed, we calculate how much temperature must be added.

steps.title: Calculate the temperature increase
steps.content:
Subtract the current temperature from the required minimum temperature:

$$55.0 - 34.3 = 20.7°F$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
